Bash(curl -s -b /tmp/cookies.txt -c /tmp/cookies.txt "http://localhost:3002/api/workflows/templates" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -X POST -d '{
  "name": "Website Environment Setup",
  "description": "Request, approve, and provision a new website environment",
  "nodes": [
    {"id": "start-1", "type": "START", "label": "Request Submitted", "positionX": 400, "positionY": 50, "config": {}, "roleAssignments": []},
    {"id": "approval-1", "type": "APPROVAL", "label": "Manager Approval", "positionX": 400, "positionY": 200, "config": {"approvalStrategy": "ANY_CAN_APPROVE", "requiredApprovals": 1, "instructions": "Review the website environment request"}, "roleAssignments": [{"roleId": "manager", "assignToOwner": false}]},
    {"id": "condition-1", "type": "CONDITION", "label": "Approval Check", "positionX": 400, "positionY": 380, "config": {"sourceApprovalNodeId": "approval-1"}, "roleAssignments": []},
    {"id": "task-1", "type": "TASK", "label": "Webmaster Setup", "positionX": 250, "positionY": 530, "config": {"description": "Set up the website environment as requested"}, "roleAssignments": [{"roleId": "webmaster", "assignToOwner": false}]},
    {"id": "task-2", "type": "TASK", "label": "Sign-off", "positionX": 250, "positionY": 680, "config": {"description": "Sign off on the completed environment"}, "roleAssignments": [{"roleId": "manager", "assignToOwner": false}]},
    {"id": "task-3", "type": "TASK", "label": "Handback to Owner", "positionX": 250, "positionY": 830, "config": {"description": "Environment is ready - review and accept"}, "roleAssignments": [{"roleId": "employee", "assignToOwner": true}]},
    {"id": "end-1", "type": "END", "label": "Completed", "positionX": 400, "positionY": 980, "config": {}, "roleAssignments": []},
    {"id": "end-2", "type": "END", "label": "Rejected", "positionX": 600, "positionY": 530, "config": {}, "roleAssignments": []}
  ],
  "edges": [
    {"id": "e-start-approval", "sourceId": "start-1", "targetId": "approval-1"},
    {"id": "e-approval-condition", "sourceId": "approval-1", "targetId": "condition-1"},
    {"id": "e-condition-approved", "sourceId": "condition-1", "targetId": "task-1", "label": "Approved", "conditionBranch": "APPROVED_PATH"},
    {"id": "e-condition-rejected", "sourceId": "condition-1", "targetId": "end-2", "label": "Rejected", "conditionBranch": "REJECTED_PATH"},
    {"id": "e-task1-signoff", "sourceId": "task-1", "targetId": "task-2"},
    {"id": "e-signoff-handback", "sourceId": "task-2", "targetId": "task-3"},
    {"id": "e-handback-end", "sourceId": "task-3", "targetId": "end-1"}
  ]
}' 2>&1)
